draft.title: GraffPUNKS & NFTs — Crypto Moonboys Wiki
draft.meta_description: Connecting GraffPUNKS and NFTs in the Crypto Moonboys universe. The GraffPUNKS are the pulsating core of the Crypto Moonboys universe, a faction that embodies the gritty,…
draft.lead_paragraph:
The GraffPUNKS are the pulsating core of the Crypto Moonboys universe, a faction that embodies the gritty, rebellious spirit of street art fused with the disruptive power of blockchain technology. They are not merely a collective but a digital uprising, a force that splashes vibrant defiance across the decentralized canvases of WAX, XRPL, SOL, and Bitcoin Cash. As the vanguard…

NFTs made artists millionaires, turned JPEGs into $69 million assets, and then crashed 95%. But underneath the hype, NFTs solved something genuinely revolutionary: provable digital ownership on the blockchain . From CryptoPunks to Bored Apes to digital music royalties to in-game items — NFTs are the ownership layer of the internet. The…

The intersection of GraffPUNKS and NFTs within the Crypto Moonboys universe is one of the most charged dynamics in Block Topia, where themes of fungible, graffpunks, nfts, tokens converge. Together they represent a layered system of rebellion, identity, and economic power in the digital frontier.

draft.title: NFTs (Non-Fungible Tokens) — Crypto Moonboys Wiki
draft.meta_description: Non-fungible tokens — digital ownership on the blockchain — Crypto Moonboys Wiki
draft.lead_paragraph:
NFTs made artists millionaires, turned JPEGs into $69 million assets, and then crashed 95%. But underneath the hype, NFTs solved something genuinely revolutionary: provable digital ownership on the blockchain . From CryptoPunks to Bored Apes to digital music royalties to in-game items — NFTs are the ownership layer of the internet. The mania may have cooled, but the technology didn't go anywhere. The concept of unique digital assets on the blockchain predates Ethereum. Colored Coins (2012) on Bitcoin attempted to represent real-world assets.…

The 1M Free NFTs Programme is a massive initiative in the Crypto Moonboys universe, distributing a million free NFTs to players and collectors, tied to the GraffPUNKS’ mission of digital democratization. Allegiance: GraffPUNKS (Primary Association) The 1M Free NFTs Programme, launched by GraffPUNKS, aims to distribute one million tokenized pieces of rebellious art across Block Topia, a massive…
